name: @tootallnate/bfstm
description: Parser and audio decoder for Nintendo's BFSTM (FSTM magic) streamed-audio format and its prefetch sibling BFSTP. Walks the block-interleaved DATA layout and decodes DSP-ADPCM / PCM16 / PCM8 channels to interleaved PCM16 samples, ready to wrap as RIFF WAVE and play in a browser.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
